tags.description: Informal off-leash dog park supported by the owner.
tags.note: June 2022: Informal agreement established c2010s between community and the owner (TCDSB) to allow use of the grounds as an off-leash dog park. The school board provides waste receptacles. The name is colloquially understood started from the instagram acct

tags.description: Dog park with two separately fenced sections: a section for small dogs (up to 30 lbs) and a large dogs (30lbs and over) / all dogs section. The dog park is supported and maintained by community volunteers.
